transcript.clean_text: as age 6 of the tour de france began riders were still counting the cost of the day before on the cobbles incidents and problems for primogeroglich and several others in the meantime a huge victory for israel premier tech and simon clark both team and ryder taking their first tour de france success fanat was still in the yellow jersey and his lead was 13 seconds ahead of nilsson palace with edward bossenhagen telepogachar and evelompat still all up there in the top five the tour de france would move to belgium for the start of stage six the longest day of this 109th tour 220 kilometers between bash and long we crossing the border back into france two and a half thousand meters of climbing up and down left and right all day long a big tail crosswind forecast for most of the day with three categorized climbs and one intermediate sprint the first visit to longwei since peter segan won five years previous the stage started with a bang wildfernat in the yellow jersey on the attack incessantly he'd eventually take quinn simmons and jacob fulson with him the latter a danger in the general classification but after 85 kilometers of racing the peloton desperate to sit up and have a rest but fernat was almost dropped immediately from the break he helped create a mechanical problem at the foot of the first climb of the day thankfully for him sorted out whilst today pogaccha started to put his team to work to make sure they kept the gap in check fanart will take the maximum points in the intermediate sprint strengthening his lead in the green jersey classification and behind borah high school ef education easy post and alpacinda koenig would start to commit not committed at all not believing in the break less than two minutes with 66 k's to go and just 24 hours before the first mountain stage fullsang decided to sit up but with just over 50 kilometers to go the gap was still two minutes simmons and fanart continue to work but simmons would only last until 30 k's to go fanart continuing and holding off for quite a while yet the rest of the peloton simmons caught and increasingly was becoming a day for the general classification riders as the nerves before the expected chaotic finish continue to build bernard had just less than 30 seconds with 17 and a half kilometers to go by this point looking like he was gonna have little or no chance to take the stage he was caught and a few called out by crashes reynold johnson from rentsburg ending up at the front and with 11 kilometers to go watfornat would be eventually reeled in not just reeled in but immediately spat out the back inside the final 10 kilometers nielsen powlas was in pole position to move into the yellow jersey alex iwoyamo is attacking on the final classified climb of the day the penultimate rise of the four inside the last 15 kilometers his teammates again out the back and himself the two-time defending champion put a dig over the top he then had two teammates assembled to do the work for him primoz roglic launched an early sprint inside the final 300 meters bulgachar chased him down matthews had survived and was trying to come around matthew's good friends with pogacchad his big mate able to hang on and win in quite sensational style a story that we told down the years after a full gas day one of the fastest stages in history over this distance at the tour de france and won by the rider of his generation and perhaps all generations that had an absolute phenomenon and again demonstrating he was the best on the planet at just about anything the yellow jersey came across seven and a half minutes down meaning we'd have a new leader stage and jersey going to tadebogacha courtesy of the bonus seconds taken on the line pagacha beating matthews guru pidcock and quintana on the day a seventh stage win in his three-year relationship so far with the tour de france and pogacha moving into the lead of the race as he looks to make it a hat-trick of tour wins a check on his gap going into the first mountain stage bogata leading by four seconds courtesy of those bonuses ahead of paulus wingago in third with yates pitch thomas vlasive martinez barde and goldu all in the top ten separated by just over a minute ten years and a day after the first ever trip in tour history to la place de belfi it's a trip to the super planche de belfie 176.3 kilometers the first true mountain stage of this tour de france a visit to the voge and with pogacha already in yellow it's already catch-up time for those hoping to take it off him remind you you can watch the giro done and the tour de france on gcn plus you
